member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.WebLogicVersion
member.summary: Supported Oracle WebLogic major versions.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentPlatform
member.summary: Target operating system platform for deployment.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentMode
member.summary: Deployment mode that controls how the engine executes.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle state of a single deployment session.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.StepStatus
member.summary: Granular state of an individual workflow step.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.ValidationSeverity
member.summary: Severity level of a validation finding.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.ServerType
member.summary: Type of WebLogic server being configured.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DomainTopology
member.summary: Domain topology type.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.InstallationComponents
member.summary: Components that can be selectively installed.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.LogLevel
member.summary: Log level used internally by the WEDM logging service.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine
member.summary: Core deployment engine contract. Implementations drive the full WebLogic installation and configuration lifecycle.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.StepProgressChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever a step's status changes.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.LogLineEmitted
member.summary: Raised whenever a log line is emitted during execution.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.OverallProgressChanged
member.summary: Raised when overall deployment progress changes (0–100).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ExecuteAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a full deployment from the given configuration.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ValidateAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validate prerequisites only — no installation performed.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.RollbackAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Roll back a previous deployment to its snapshot state.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ResumeAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resume a failed deployment from the last successful step.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService
member.summary: Structured logging service contract for the WEDM platform. Implementations write to Serilog sinks (file, console, structured JSON, HTML). All logs are correlated by deployment session ID.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.SessionId
member.summary: Current deployment session ID for log correlation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepStarted(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Log the start of a named deployment step.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepSucceeded(System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.String)
member.summary: Log successful completion of a step with optional output.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepFailed(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Exception)
member.summary: Log failure of a step.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.ScriptOutput(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Log a single line of script output (stdout/stderr).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.GetEntries(WEDM.Domain.Enums.LogLevel)
member.summary: Get all log entries for report generation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.WriteHtmlReportAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport,System.String)
member.summary: Write an HTML deployment report to the given path.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.WriteJsonReportAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport,System.String)
member.summary: Write a JSON deployment report to the given path.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.EntryWritten
member.summary: Raised on each log write for real-time UI binding.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor
member.summary: Contract for executing PowerShell scripts and inline commands from C# code. Decouples the automation engine from the actual PowerShell runtime, enabling easy testing and alternative executor implementations.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteScriptAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a PowerShell script file with optional named parameters. Returns the structured execution result including stdout, stderr, exit code and duration.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteCommandAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an inline PowerShell command string. Useful for short imperative operations (registry writes, dir creation, service install).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteModuleFunctionAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a PowerShell module function by loading a .psm1 and calling a named function.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.OutputReceived
member.summary: Stream output: fires OutputReceived for each stdout line during execution.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ErrorReceived
member.summary: Fires for each stderr line.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.PowerShellResult
member.summary: Result returned by any PowerShell execution call.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine
member.summary: Contract for the prerequisite validation engine. Implementations run all system checks before any installation begins.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateAllAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run the full prerequisite validation suite.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateOperatingSystemAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run only OS-level checks (version, architecture, activation).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateHardwareAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check RAM and CPU resources meet WebLogic minimums.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateDiskSpaceAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify disk space on the target drives.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePortsAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check whether required TCP ports are available (not in use).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePrivilegesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify current process has Administrator privileges.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateJavaAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Detect and validate existing JDK installation or planned JDK installer.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateVcRedistAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check VC++ redistributable presence.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePayloadIntegrityAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify all payload binary files are present and SHA-256 checksums match.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateDatabaseConnectivityAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Test Oracle DB connectivity (if RCU is required).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates the ordered execution of deployment steps. Responsible for step sequencing, retry policy, rollback triggers, and progress reporting. The engine is stateless per invocation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.BuildStepPlan(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration)
member.summary: Build the ordered step list for the given configuration (no execution).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RunAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the workflow step by step with full error handling and retry.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RunStepAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep,WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a single named step (for retry / resume scenarios).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RollbackAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep},WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempt rollback of all steps that support it, in reverse order.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration
member.summary: Root deployment configuration model. Represents a complete, serialisable deployment plan that drives the entire automation engine. Designed for external configuration (JSON/YAML), GUI-driven wizard, and silent deployment.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport
member.summary: Complete deployment report generated at the end of a deployment session. Persisted to JSON and rendered as an HTML report for auditing and compliance.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.LogEntry
member.summary: Structured log entry for audit trail.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep
member.summary: Represents a single atomic step within a deployment workflow. Steps are orchestrated by the DeploymentWorkflowEngine and executed in order. Each step is independently retryable, loggable, and rollback-aware.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.StepExecutionResult
member.summary: Represents the result of executing a step's action — returned by automation executors.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.ValidationFinding
member.summary: Result of a single validation check executed by the PrerequisiteValidator.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.ValidationFinding.#ctor(System.String,WEDM.Domain.Enums.ValidationSeverity,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Result of a single validation check executed by the PrerequisiteValidator.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult
member.summary: Aggregated result of all prerequisite validation checks for a deployment.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.CanProceed
member.summary: True only when no Fatal or Error-level findings exist.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.IsClean
member.summary: True when all checks passed without any findings.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.DeploymentId
member.summary: Optional deployment correlation ID.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.Merge(WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult)
member.summary: Merge all findings from another result set into this one.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.New(System.Guid)
member.summary: Factory — create an empty result associated with a deployment.
